plan_section: Step 6: Full 4-character PrefixMatrix parity and reserved/collision logic

plan_alignment.notes: The staged changes implement shared 4-character prefix analysis, reserved/collision logic, deterministic suggestions, snapshot-hook integration, NamingWizard conflict checks, parity manifest updates, and requested test coverage.

correctness_safety.notes: The reserved-in-use free-count bug is fixed by direct free-cell counting, and added tests cover the corrected edge case.

code_quality.notes: The helper remains typed and pure, UI state is contained, and the components use the shared analysis instead of duplicating prefix logic.

completeness.notes: The previous missing Playwright collision/reserved assertions were added, and unit coverage now includes reserved-in-use counting.

patterns.notes: The implementation follows existing component/test patterns and keeps map data behind useMapSnapshot.

integration.notes: Imports, sample data, PrefixMatrix, NamingWizard, parity manifest, and smoke tests integrate cleanly with the staged Step 6 scope.

flags.note: Primary cells expose reserved=true when any 4-character subcell is reserved; this is acceptable for this step but could be separated later if UI copy needs to distinguish whole-prefix reservations from reserved subcells.

verification_notes: Implementer reported npm run test:unit passed, 6 files / 40 tests.
Implementer reported npm run build passed.
Implementer reported scoped Playwright prefix-matrix smoke passed.
Implementer reported npm run lint passed.
Implementer reported npm run typecheck passed.
Implementer reported critical page smoke passed, 5 tests.
Full npm run test:e2e was not reported as passing due to the previously noted out-of-scope /map axe issue.
